SVG: four Lewis (electron-dot) structure options A–D for an oxygen molecule. A = O=O double bond with two lone pairs each (correct); B = O≡O triple bond; C = O–O single bond; D = bent three-O distractor.

SVG data table (same as page-06): identify substances by state, solubility and conductivity with blank Select cells.

Mis-crop: pure text (CO2 fire-extinguisher method steps 1–6 and Q4a prompt). No diagram to recreate.

render_data.title: Home-made CO₂ fire extinguisher — candles extinguished vs mass of baking soda
render_data.prompt: 100 cm³ vinegar held constant; 1–5 spoons of baking soda added, CO₂ poured over lit candles.
render_data.trend: More baking soda → more CO₂ → more candles extinguished.
render_data.note: Drag the cursor along the line of best fit to read off candles extinguished at any baking-soda mass.

image_prompt: SVG: three dry-powder fire-extinguisher comparison cards (Handheld 3.2 kg / 2 m²; Hanging 5.6 kg / 3 m²; Ball 1.3 kg / 35 m²) with original illustrations of each extinguisher plus weight, area, expiry, direction and operation data.
Mis-crop: pure text (Q5a research statement, Q5b/Q5c prompts). No diagram to recreate.
Mis-crop: pure text (Q6 sleep-science script about adenosine and caffeine). No diagram to recreate.

SVG skeletal structures of adenosine (purine base + ribose, ribose CH2OH/hydroxyl circled red = alcohol) and caffeine (xanthine ring, fused-ring C=C circled red = alkene) for Q6a functional-group identification.
